title: World Cup Han Element Interactive Portrait AI
sourceTitle: World Cup Han Element Interactive Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 realistic World Cup stadium han-element interaction portrait for Argentina national-team color inspiration, featuring adult young East Asian woman with bright natural eyes, sweet open smile, real skin texture, and light summer energy. Subject: adult young East Asian woman with bright natural eyes, sweet open smile, real skin texture, and light summer energy smiles brightly and leans toward the phone camera with sunny natural eye contact, realistic skin texture, natural hair, and lively summer stadium energy. Scene: World Cup spectator stand or sideline viewing area with modern stadium tiers, guardrail, blue sky, and distant green pitch with modern stadium structure, spectator seats, green football pitch, blue sky, and real match-day atmosphere. Composition: Fixed close slightly-low interactive phone perspective: subject leans forward, hands placed in thigh-up near-camera interactive portrait with direct gentle gaze, shy smile, and approachable romantic posture, face near the upper frame, body posture light and natural, with tasteful framing and clean editorial framing. Signature Elements: Slightly low near-camera stadium portrait, forward-leaning bright smile, han-element summer outfit, team-color embroidery and ribbons, light sash and gauze layers, hands resting naturally near the knees, modern stadium tiers, guardrail, blue sky, distant green pitch, and spontaneous match-day photography feel. Fixed source details: Team Color Palette: sky blue, white, and soft gold supporter accents. Style: High-definition realistic portrait photography with han-element summer outfit styling, natural fabric texture, clean skin detail, slight wind in hair, and polished but spontaneous stadium snapshot feeling. Color Palette: fixed source color palette with concrete palette cues from the prompt appears in outfit trims, ribbons, embroidery, and small supporter details while preserving natural daylight and realistic skin tones. Lighting: Bright natural stadium daylight with controlled exposure, clear facial detail, fabric highlights, and believable background separation. Materials: airy han-element summer blouse with high-waist pleated skirt, sheer ribbon drape, thin sash, embroidered sky-blue team-color trim, and natural fabric folds has real fabric folds, pleats, embroidery, thin sash, gauze layers, skirt texture, and stable accessory detail. Restrictions: Keep an adult subject, tasteful stadium portrait framing, natural expression, realistic skin texture, stable hands and feet, coherent han-element outfit layers, believable stadium background, balanced daylight exposure, and lively summer supporter energy.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
